title: The Data Warehouse Toolkit: The Definitive Guide to Dimensional Modeling

tldr.text: The Data Warehouse Toolkit: The Definitive Guide to Dimensional Modeling, 3rd Edition is a complete library of updated dimensional modeling techniques, the most comprehensive collection ever.
